content.en:
"Have you gathered ten mid-level peak realm gods?"

Ye Tian was very excited.

He estimated that it was this period, and now it was finally completed.

Immediately, he summoned these ten mid-rank peak realm gods.

Soon.

These ten median peak realm gods came, and after Ye Tian confirmed that their cultivation had reached the middle peak cultivation of the Eternal Realm God Realm, he immediately contacted the realm court headquarters and applied to become a top force.

After the Realm Court Headquarters got the news, it immediately sent a high-level realm god to the Terran for an assessment, and if the assessment was passed, then the Terran would become a top force.

Whether a force can become a top-notch force is not something that can be determined casually, nor can it be decided by just a few high-level realm gods.

Therefore, this assessment will be tested by the Boundary Court Headquarters from time to time, and it is impossible to cheat, even if the Terrans buy off several high-level Realm Gods who are responsible for the assessment by the Boundary Court Headquarters, it will be useless, and once it is discovered, the Terrans will never be able to become a top force.

However, the human race itself has the strength of the top forces, and it has reached all the standards, so it is natural that there is no panic at all.

......

this day.

The three gods of the Realm Tribunal Headquarters have come to the Terrans. 060

Chen'an Realm God!

Sturgeon Shun Realm God!

Tungsten God!

Ye Tian personally entertained these three high-level realm gods.

At this time, the Chen'an Realm God spoke: "Ye Tian Realm God, this time the assessment is under the test of the Realm Court Headquarters, so don't pay attention to the void, you still bring together the Terran Realm God, we need to assess the Terran Realm God, and only after reaching the standard will we allow the Terran to become the top force." "

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, he asked the gods of the human race to come over one after another.

Among them, there are four high-level realm gods, ten middle-level peak realm gods, and many middle-level realm gods, beginner-level realm gods, and ordinary realm gods.

Immediately.

The Chen'an Realm Gods let the Realm Gods of the Race take action one after another, show their strength, and ensure that these Realm Gods are real Realm Gods, not fake Realm Gods that are spurred out by special means.

Thundered!!!!

After these realm gods took action, they confirmed that they were correct.

Next, it is to test the strength of those ten mid-level peak realm gods, this is the most important thing!

After all, the Terrans have just reached the standard of ten middle-level peak realm gods, and not one less is enough, if one of them (AFBD) is not up to standard, then they will determine that the Terran has failed the assessment.

This time.

The Chen'an Realm Gods also brought some mid-level peak realm gods for them to learn from each other.

Outcome.

Thundered!!!!

The middle-level peak realm gods of the human race brought a huge shock to the gods of the Chen'an realm.

The gods of the Chen'an realm also know the human race very well, and the time of their rise is too short, so they thought that the human race was to gather ten middle-level peak realm gods, and they spent countless resources to be piled up, and they didn't care about the foundation.

Therefore, it is very likely that these ten middle-level peak realm gods are all weak, and they are even inferior to the generally weaker middle-level peak realm gods.

As a result, the mid-level peak realm gods he brought were easily swept away by the mid-level peak realm gods of the human race.

After ten battles, the Terran won all, and the mid-level peak realm gods he brought ushered in ten consecutive defeats, which made the three of their high-level peak realm gods a little embarrassed.

The next step is the assessment of the high-level peak realm gods, which is still a competition to witness the strength.

However, the Chen'an Realm God also knew that Ye Tian's strength was terrifying, and he didn't dare to test Ye Tian's strength.

The Realm Court Headquarters will not ask to test Ye Tian's combat power, but only to test it against another high-level Terran Realm God.

"Ye Tianjie God, please also let the two high-level Terran Realm Gods take action and conduct an assessment. "

"Xingchen, Xingyue, you two can make a move!"

Ye Tian shouted.

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue responded.

Among the three high-level realm gods who came to conduct the assessment, except for the Chen'an realm god, who condensed eight eternal realm spirits, the other two only condensed seven eternal realm spirits.

The Chen'an Realm God asked these two high-level realm gods to test the strength of Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue, and the two sides began to fight.

"Xingchen, Xingyue, save your hand a little, and give the high-level realm god of the Realm Court Headquarters a little face. "

Ye Tian said.

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue naturally understood, otherwise they could defeat these two high-level realm gods with a single move.

The battle begins!

In an instant, they fought, and throughout the whole process, they seemed to be evenly matched, but if you looked closely, it could be seen that Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue had suppressed these two high-level realm gods, and they suppressed them very easily.

The god of the Chen'an Realm did not speak, but it could be seen that Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue had not exerted their true strength at all, and their true strength was very strong.

If you continue to fight, you will only lose face.

So, he immediately spoke: "Okay, the Terran assessment has passed, let's end it!"

Immediately.

The two high-level realm gods at the Realm Court Headquarters stopped, and Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue also stopped.

"Chen'an Realm God, our human race can become a top force, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

Chen'an Realm God said: "It should be no problem, but whether the human race can become a top force or not is not something I can decide, but a decision by the Boundary Court Headquarters, so I can't give a definite answer." "

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

However, as long as the requirements are met, the Realm Court Headquarters will not deliberately let the Terran not advance to the top power, unless sufficient reasons must be given.

Therefore, there is no need to worry about the promotion of the Terrans.

Subsequently.

The Chen'an Realm Gods left the Terran Realm and returned to the Realm Headquarters.

......

Little by little, time passed.

It didn't take too long for the reply from the Realm Court Headquarters to arrive.

The Realm Headquarters announced that the Terrans had become the top power, and announced it to the public.

However, the headquarters of the Terran to become the top force is located in the Eternal Realm, not the Realm of the Realm of the Gods, after all, the territory of the Terrans in the realm of the Realm God Kingdom is too small and does not meet the standards of the top forces.

Currently, the Terrans are the only top-tier power headquartered in the Eternal Realm.

After becoming a top force, the human race can send ten middle-level realm gods to serve in the realm court headquarters, and the position will not be low, which is the authority of the top force.

Other than that.

The Terrans also have a large number of places, and they can freely enter and exit between the Eternal Realm and the Realm of the Gods.

In addition to these, there are many other benefits and resources.

But the most important benefit is that the Terrans can choose a boundary of the rift, participate in it, and compete for the resources of the boundary of the rift.

For example, if the Terrans choose the boundary of the East Wu Realm Seam, then they can always station the Terran Realm gods in the East Wu Realm Gap in the future.

But Ye Tian hadn't chosen which realm to divide for the time being, after all, the Terran Race's current focus was on the Eternal Realm, not the Eastern Wu Realm.

So, this matter can not be rushed.
